name: |Mobius... But under Combine rule|
description:
Strange anomalous readings had been occuring Mobius, and came with it random portals of alien flora and creatures. Then the Combine came and took over...

They industrialized certain parts of the planet and left other parts to die and get infested with Xen Flora...

Mobians were enslaved and had their population rapidly decreased, fighters like Sonic and Shadow had disappeared and Dr. Robotnik became the supervisor of the planet by the Combine...

All hope seemed lost for the planet... Until someone smelled the ashes and became the hope that was needed...
creator: Kectsup
